posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: President Trump's purchase of 10% of Intel was worth $8.9 billion in August 2025. Today, Apple announced a deal with Intel and this position is worth $56.5 billion.

twitter.content:
This is absolutely insane:

President Trump's purchase of 10% of Intel, $INTC, was worth $8.9 billion in August 2025.

Today, Apple announced a deal with Intel and this position is worth $56.5 billion.

That's a gain of +$47.6 BILLION in less than 8 months.

Truly unprecedented.
